name: Self-hosted homelab on K3s
description: Four-node K3s cluster on commodity hardware sitting at home. Hands-on with the full delivery path — packaging, deployment, networking, observability — for the services I actually use, including this site.

name: Sonatype Maven Central Publisher
description: Open-source Gradle plugin I authored and maintain on the official Plugin Portal. Publishes JVM artefacts to Maven Central through Sonatype's Central Portal API. Demo projects: github.com/ani2fun/plugin-demo.

name: Synapse
description: An interactive platform for studying data structures, algorithms, and system design — markdown-driven books with runnable code and visualisations. A ground-up all-Scala rebuild of Cortex: ZIO 2 + tapir + zio-http on the backend, a React-free Scala.js + Laminar SPA on the frontend, with content living in its own synapse-content repo. Lives at synapse.kakde.eu, deployed to the homelab cluster.

name: Cortex
description: The first version of my interactive CS knowledge base — data-structures, algorithms and system-design books with runnable code blocks, D3 visualisers, and an AI coach, serving several hundred users. Now archived with no active development — superseded by the ground-up Synapse rebuild.

name: Portfolio App
description: You're looking at it. kakde.eu is a fully static Scala portfolio — Scala.js + scalajs-react on the frontend, Tailwind v4 for styling, bundled with Vite. A trivial zio-http server serves the compiled bundle plus a health check; the interactive knowledge base it used to ship with grew into Synapse (synapse.kakde.eu). Packaged as a container and deployed to my homelab K3s cluster.
